entry.title: Decoded Inventory | midas_support_beam_archive
entry.note: binary .meb table directory inventory는 추출됐지만, 아직 heuristic geometry preview까지는 안정적으로 만들지 못한 상태입니다. source member와 table coverage를 먼저 확인하는 진단 페이지입니다.

mcvl_node_elem_probe.note: NODE/ELEM token rows are present. Decode the hinted MCVL ranges into actual node coordinates and member connectivity.

mcvl_node_record_probe.note: NODE hinted range records mostly expose sparse scalar slots. Record-local exact xyz decode is not justified yet.

mcvl_node_reassembly_probe.note: Cross-record NODE xyz reassembly candidates are visible in the hinted scalar stream, but this is still probe-level evidence rather than exact xyz recovery.

mcvl_node_scalar_lane_probe.note: MCVL hinted range was scanned as 4x float64 lanes per 32-byte record to expose sparse scalar placement. This is structural evidence only, not a verified NODE xyz decode. Active scalar lanes rotate across the 32-byte record and frequently co-occur with small uint fragments in neighboring slots.

mcvl_node_uint_layout_probe.note: MCVL hinted range was scanned as 8x uint32 fields per 32-byte record to expose field-layout evidence. Sparse small uint32 values are present, which may be useful as the next offset/layout probe.

mcvl_elem_uint_layout_probe.note: MCVL hinted range was scanned as 8x uint32 fields per 32-byte record to expose field-layout evidence. Sparse small uint32 values are present, which may be useful as the next offset/layout probe. A subset of records are 0x20-filled, which looks more like padding or text-aligned filler than resolved member references at this stride.

mcvl_node_xyz_slot_recovery_probe.note: NODE hinted range에서 phase-triplet 후보를 다시 읽어보면, 4/5 tuple이 3-lane coverage를 보입니다. 이건 hint-guided preview보다 강한 parser-side evidence지만, record-local exact xyz decode를 정당화할 정도는 아직 아닙니다.
